requirement.description: When the front-right door changes from open to closed, the system shall immediately make the updated door status available to the display controller.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFR transitions from Open (1) to Closed (0) when the door is closed.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFR transitions 1 → 0 and is transmitted immediately
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s02_001_doorfr_open_to_closed(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_fr(msgs[-1]) == 0

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFR remains Closed after closing the door.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFR remains 0 in all received frames

test_cases.test_objective: Verify periodic transmission of DoorFR = Closed.
Verify DoorFR update latency is immediate.
test_cases.expected_result: First frame reflects DoorFR = 0 without delay

test_cases.test_objective: Verify deterministic DoorFR behavior across repeated open→close cycles.
test_cases.expected_result: Each close event consistently produces DoorFR = 0

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFR status after ignition cycle while the door is closed.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFR = 0 correctly transmitted after ignition restart

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFR update does not affect other door signals.
test_cases.expected_result: Only DoorFR changes to 0; others remain unchanged

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFR update while vehicle is moving.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFR = 0 transmitted correctly while vehicle is moving
